module_info.docstring:
Git Archive Failure Handling Tests.

Tests for graceful handling of Git archive issues:
- Archive directory missing (should auto-create)
- Git repo not initialized (should auto-init)
- Concurrent archive writes (locking)
- Invalid file paths sanitized
- Large attachment handling

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-c2x

classes.name: TestArchiveAutoCreation
classes.docstring: Tests for automatic archive directory and repo creation.

methods.name: test_ensure_archive_root_creates_directory
methods.docstring: ensure_archive_root creates storage directory if missing.

methods.name: test_ensure_archive_root_initializes_git_repo
methods.docstring: ensure_archive_root initializes Git repo if not present.

methods.name: test_ensure_archive_creates_project_directory
methods.docstring: ensure_archive creates project-specific directory.

methods.name: test_ensure_archive_is_idempotent
methods.docstring: ensure_archive can be called multiple times safely.

methods.name: test_ensure_archive_creates_lock_file_path
methods.docstring: ensure_archive sets up lock file path correctly.

methods.name: test_git_repo_has_gitattributes
methods.docstring: Git repo should have .gitattributes file.

methods.name: test_git_repo_has_initial_commit
methods.docstring: Git repo should have initial commit.

methods.name: test_git_repo_gpg_signing_disabled
methods.docstring: Git repo should have GPG signing disabled.

classes.name: TestConcurrentArchiveWrites
classes.docstring: Tests for concurrent archive write locking.

methods.name: test_archive_write_lock_basic
methods.docstring: archive_write_lock can be acquired and released.

methods.name: test_archive_write_lock_prevents_concurrent_access
methods.docstring: archive_write_lock prevents concurrent writes.

methods.name: test_archive_write_lock_queues_waiters
methods.docstring: archive_write_lock queues multiple waiters correctly.

methods.name: test_archive_write_lock_released_on_exception
methods.docstring: archive_write_lock releases lock when exception occurs.

classes.name: TestFilePathSanitization
classes.docstring: Tests for invalid file path handling.

methods.name: test_write_agent_profile_creates_directory
methods.docstring: write_agent_profile creates agent directory if missing.

methods.name: test_write_agent_profile_handles_special_characters
methods.docstring: write_agent_profile handles agent names safely.

methods.name: test_heal_archive_locks_cleans_orphaned_metadata
methods.docstring: heal_archive_locks removes metadata files without locks.

methods.name: test_heal_archive_locks_handles_missing_root
methods.docstring: heal_archive_locks handles missing storage root gracefully.

methods.name: test_heal_archive_locks_returns_summary
methods.docstring: heal_archive_locks returns structured summary.

methods.name: test_file_lock_writes_metadata
methods.docstring: AsyncFileLock writes owner metadata.

methods.name: test_file_lock_detects_stale_lock
methods.docstring: AsyncFileLock detects stale locks from dead processes.

methods.name: test_file_lock_prevents_reentrant_acquisition
methods.docstring: AsyncFileLock prevents re-entrant acquisition.

methods.name: test_archive_handles_large_content
methods.docstring: Archive operations handle large content without issues.
